blockingIssues.description: Feature contract required a Next.js 15 scaffold, but the implemented dependency is `next@16.2.3` in package.json.
User sync behavior is implemented but never invoked in runtime code, so first authenticated access does not create/update the corresponding users table row.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` with a factual version note documenting mission target (Next.js 15) vs current dependency (`next@16.2.3`) and pinning guidance for future scaffolds.
Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` to document Clerk v7 auth-component nuance (`Show` patterns vs legacy `SignedIn`/`SignedOut` imports).
Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` to document this repo's shadcn/base-ui composition convention using `render` props instead of Radix-style `asChild` in common trigger/content patterns.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align lint guidance with executable project commands by replacing `npx next lint` with `npx eslint .` for this mission.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md instructs `npx next lint`, while `.factory/services.yaml` defines lint as `npx eslint .`; multiple reviewers flagged this mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit exceptions for infrastructure/operations-only features so strict TDD-first and mandatory browser/manual-validation steps are not treated as universal requirements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Scaffolding and DB-only features repeatedly reported procedure mismatch/deviations around mandatory red-phase tests and manual browser checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure-evidence requirements so `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` cannot be marked true when required steps (e.g., mandatory reads or TDD order) were skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews observed transcript/skill-feedback inconsistencies (missing required reads and tests executed only after implementation while feedback still reported full adherence).

rejectedObservations.observation: Lint command mismatch between mission guidance and services.yaml.
General TDD order mismatch observations without concrete correctness impact on feature output.
